hero.title: Hi, I'm Junior
hero.description: Back-End Developer with strong experience in Python (FastAPI) and Java (Spring Boot), focused on building scalable APIs, high-performance integrations, and cloud-ready systems.

about.title: About Me
about.text: Back-End Developer with hands-on experience building personal and real-world projects using Python (FastAPI) and Java (Spring Boot). I have developed 19 REST endpoints, implemented multiple MongoDB CRUD operations, and applied Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and Repository Pattern. Experienced in entity modeling, transactions, pagination, DTOs, validation, and automated testing. Focused on delivering scalable, maintainable backend systems and continuously evolving as part of high-performance engineering teams.
about.subtitle_1: Systems Analysis and Development Technologist – Uninter (2024–2026)
about.subtitle_2: Java Spring Professional: Spring Boot, JPA/Hibernate, REST APIs, Security (OAuth2/JWT), Docker, Docker Compose, and CI/CD pipelines.
about.subtitle_3: Python Training Course: Flask, MVC architecture, JWT authentication, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, real-time communication, and backend best practices.
about.experience_1_desc: Built 13 REST endpoints with Spring Boot (CRUD, pagination, and sorting) and modeled 8+ JPA entities with complex relationships. Implemented security with Spring Security, OAuth2, and JWT, applying layered architecture, DTOs, and centralized exception handling.
about.experience_2_desc: Built 4+ applications with Flask and FastAPI, covering 30+ REST endpoints with business rules and validations. Applied Clean Architecture and SOLID principles, managed SQLite and PostgreSQL databases, and implemented Redis caching for performance optimization.
about.experience_3_desc: Led technical analysis and CRM implementations for international clients, architecting automations, API integrations, and workflows. Served as technical reference for analysts and clients, supporting SaaS pre-sales. Results: +20% commercial efficiency and −10% operational time.
about.experience_4_desc: Consulted on CRM implementation, configuring pipelines, automations, and commercial workflows. Developed API-based system integrations and chatbots, supporting projects with WhatsApp API and Instagram. Delivered client presentations and trained new analysts.
about.experience_5_desc: Participated in CRM implementation and configuration, including pipelines, automations, and chatbots. Supported API integrations, documented processes, and conducted client onboarding. Developed a technical case presented to leadership.

projects.title: Projects
projects.title_featured_project: RESTful API for client management built with Java and Spring Boot, featuring full CRUD operations, layered architecture, DTOs, data validation, and centralized exception handling.

contact.subtitle: Shall we turn your idea into reality?
